---
title: "Artwork"
---




<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing1.jpg" width="500px" height="500px" style="object-fit: cover;
              margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Bling Contour

**Size:** 500 x 500 

<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing2.jpg" width="500px" height="500px" style="object-fit: cover;
              margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Contour

**Size:** 500 x 500 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing3.jpg" width="500px" height="730px" style="object-fit: cover;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-top: 70px;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>


**Medium:** Contour

**Size:** 500 x 730 



<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing4.jpg" width="560px" height="730px" style="object-fit: cover;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-top: 70px;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Line Weight

**Size:** 560 x 730 



<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing5.jpg" width="500px" height="700px" style="object-fit: cover;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-top: 70px;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Negative Space

**Size:** 500 x 700 



<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing6.jpg" width="700px" height="500px" style="object-fit: cover;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-top: 70px;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Planes

**Size:** 700 x 500 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing7.jpg" width="700px" height="500px" style="object-fit: cover;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-top: 70px;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Planes

**Size:** 700 x 500 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing8.jpg" width="500px" height="800px" style="object-fit: cover;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-top: 70px;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Values

**Size:** 500 x 800 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing9.jpg" width="700px" height="900px" style="object-fit: cover;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-top: 70px;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Perspective

**Size:** 700 x 900 



<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing10.jpg" width="700px" height="800px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Perspective

**Size:** 700 x 800 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing10.5.jpg" width="700px" height="700px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Perspective

**Size:** 700 x 700 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing11.jpg" width="900px" height="1300px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Perspective

**Size:** 900 x 1300 



<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing12.jpg" width="700px" height="500px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Perspective

**Size:** 700 x 500 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing13.jpg" width="900px" height="1100px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Collaborative Drawing

**Size:** 900 x 1100 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing14.jpg" width="800px" height="700px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Texture

**Size:** 800 x 700 

<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing16.jpg" width="500px" height="500px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Texture

**Size:** 500 x 500 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing15.jpg" width="950px" height="1000px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Drapery

**Size:** 950 x 1000 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing17.jpg" width="700px" height="500px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Gesture Drawing

**Size:** 700 x 500 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing18.jpg" width="500px" height="800px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>

**Medium:** Words and Texture

**Size:** 500 x 800 


<p style="text-align: center;">

```{=html}
<img src="Drawing19.jpg" width="550px" height="500px" style="object-fit: cover;
margin-top: 70px;
              border: 5px solid #333;
              margin-bottom: 30px;"/>
```

</p>
